paper_title: Towards Characterization of 5-List-Colorability of Toroidal Graphs
summary: The conjecture that a graph drawn on the torus is critical for 5-choosability if and only if it is 6-critical remains open. The source paper (arXiv:2407.18800) establishes this equivalence under the additional assumption that there exists a cyclic system of non-contractible triangles around the torus with consecutive triangles at distance at most four, with K_7 as the sole exceptional case handled separately. A wide web search covering Dvořák's publication record through 2026 found no follow-up paper proving or disproving the full conjecture.
search_queries: Dvořák 5-choosability toroidal critical 2025 arxiv list coloring torus
notes: The HTML version of the paper labels the criticality formulation as 'Conjecture 3 (equivalent formulation)' while 'Conjecture 2' states the equivalent 'A toroidal graph is 5-choosable if and only if it is 5-colorable'; these are logically equivalent statements. The paper's Theorem 1 resolves a special case (cyclic non-contractible triangle systems of spacing ≤ 4). No resolution of the full conjecture was found in the indexed literature as of May 2026.
